components-textinput.name: TextInput.Root

stories.name: Default
stories.snippet:
const Default = () => <TextInput.Root>(<>
      <TextInput.Icon>
        <Envelope />
      </TextInput.Icon>
      <TextInput.Input placeholder="Type your e-mail address" />
    </>)</TextInput.Root>;

stories.name: Without Icon
stories.snippet: const WithoutIcon = () => <TextInput.Root><TextInput.Input placeholder="Type your e-mail address" /></TextInput.Root>;

components-textinput.import:
import { Envelope } from "phosphor-react";
import { TextInput } from "react-design-system";
